programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: All Manners of Murder
programme.desc: Advice columnist Nelly is invited to a lavish dinner at Grand Arlott manor after encouraging an eccentric widow to reconcile with her estranged family and brings Detective Michael as her date.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when her the friend (Tim Dunigan) of her nephew (Todd Bryant) is accused of murdering a female sportscaster.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A jealous mystery-writer (Jean Simmons) creates havoc for Jessica when her own publisher tells her that her work is slipping.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: Mirror, Mirror, on the Wall, Part 2 of 2
programme.desc: Eudora admits she stole Jessica's notes, but denies poisoning the apples she brought or murdering the detective who was following her.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica becomes involved in a dangerous espionage case in Athens, Greece, after a chance encounter in Paris with British agent Michael Haggerty (Len Cariou).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A parishioner confesses murder to a pastor, who cannot divulge the truth when an innocent man is accused.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when her the friend (Tim Dunigan) of her nephew (Todd Bryant) is accused of murdering a female sportscaster.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A jealous mystery-writer (Jean Simmons) creates havoc for Jessica when her own publisher tells her that her work is slipping.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: Mirror, Mirror, on the Wall, Part 2 of 2
programme.desc: Eudora admits she stole Jessica's notes, but denies poisoning the apples she brought or murdering the detective who was following her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A staged argument results in the death of a talk-show co-host; guests Regis Philbin and Kathie Lee Gifford.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A murder at a local high school leads Mark to conclude that one of the students is demanding too high a price for her friendship.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates a racing team when an autopsy reveals that one of the drivers, thought to have died in a fiery crash, was actually killed hours before.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old patient dies due to hospital bureaucracy, Mark and Jesse take on the system to ensure that it doesn't happen again.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.sub-title: Have I Got a Steele for You
programme.desc: A woman suspects fraud when she learns of her husband's substantial investment in an inventor's (Michael Constantine) new doll.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: A Texas tycoon joins in Laura and Remington's search for the shady talent agents who want to prevent a singer's rise to stardom.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Mildred's nephew (Albert Macklin) helps a call-girl (Nancy Everhard) move a slain executive's body into Remington's apartment.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben ponders a 40-year-old link between his own father and a playwright's murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben ponders a 40-year-old link between his own father and a playwright's murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben investigates a murder with the help of the victim's ghost (Franc Luz), whose widow is accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben regrets teaching a public seminar on criminal law, when one of his students disappears without a trace after a class discussion on the perfect crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A country singer is murdered after firing her manager, who claims he was framed by the investigating lieutenant.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries
programme.desc: Billie Blessings has been buying supplies at Fairchild Markets since she was a little girl, so she is dismayed when one of the owners of the popular grocery store chain is found dead, crushed by collapsing shelves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries
programme.desc: Cooking show host Billie Blessings is excited to learn that her boss has hired celebrity interior designer Marian Robbins to redecorate the studio's offices, then Marian's identical twin sister, Jasmine, turns up dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The death of a venerable female mystery writer takes Jessica back to a 1947 murder aboard the Queen Mary.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica can't make sense of clues surrounding a real-estate developer's murder and his wife's suicide.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend's (Ken Howard) dog-sitting assignment turns to mystery when the canine's owner doesn't return.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While visiting a friend in Jamaica, Jessica encounters voodoo and black magic when a family celebration is marred by murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An unsent letter turns up in an old bureau bought at a rummage sale the same day arson occurs in a furniture store; are these events connected?

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The death of a venerable female mystery writer takes Jessica back to a 1947 murder aboard the Queen Mary.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica can't make sense of clues surrounding a real-estate developer's murder and his wife's suicide.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend's (Ken Howard) dog-sitting assignment turns to mystery when the canine's owner doesn't return.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica becomes involved in a double-murder investigation when she attends an opera opening with old friend Dennis Stanton (Keith Michell) in San Francisco.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica spends the weekend on a remote island with a tycoon (Gene Barry) who thinks his life is in danger.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend, a top-flight homicide detective (Barry Newman), investigates the cover-up of a young woman's murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica may be forced into public office when a woman arrives in town claiming Cabot Cove's bachelor mayor is the father of her five children.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The questionable identity of a body found by a railroad track leads to murder and becomes the inspiration for Jessica's latest novel.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica befriends a Cabot Cove newcomer who is a murder suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: How to Make a Killing Without Really Trying
programme.desc: Jessica enters the world of high finance when she attempts to solve the murder of her stockbroker, a partner in a prestigious Wall Street firm.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's niece (Genie Francis) is a suspect in the murder of a real-estate client, a rich movie heiress in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow
programme.desc: Three generations of women aspire to share a house, a law practice and their feelings. Claire Darrow, an idealistic lawyer, fights for what's right, regardless of whether it makes her a dime. Naomi is her mother, whose view of the law is more elastic and profitable. They clash on nearly everything, especially on the best way to raise Claire's daughter, Louise, a bright 12-year-old with an older soul.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow: In the Key of Murder
programme.desc: A simple offer of legal advice turns into the biggest challenge of Claire's legal career when Miles' younger sister is arrested for murder. Although Claire has never tried a murder case, she works with Miles to uncover the truth behind the crime.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow
programme.desc: Claire finds herself defending a woman already convicted of murder, while Miles questions his role as prosecuting attorney and helps her on the case.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: A Darrow Mystery
programme.desc: Attorney Claire Darrow defends her mother's former colleague in a murder case. Things get complicated when Claire's romantic interest is named as the prosecuting attorney on the case.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a variety-show reunion to research the 25-year-old unsolved murder of TV host Richie King (Kim Strauss), and while she's investigating, a show writer (Gavin MacLeod) is shot backstage.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: One of Jessica's former students, a scriptwriter for a TV show, must find the killer of a network executive or look for another job.
